title: BrowserStack Student Developer Pack Offer
description: Test your web apps with BrowserStack's Real Device Cloud, which gives you instant access to 2000+ browsers and real iOS and Android devices.
eligibility: Verified students aged 13 or older who are approved for the GitHub Student Developer Pack; provider restrictions may also apply.
value: Free Automate Mobile Plan for 1 parallel and 1 user for 1 year.
